name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.8.0 visual history and branch understanding: branch relationship summaries, ahead/behind counts, merge-base inspection, and safer merge-preview context
added: Branch relationship overview for current branch vs upstream, develop, and main
Merge-base inspection for branch relationship decisions
Unique commit preview for selected branch pairs before merge or release promotion
History tab relationship panel for safer branch understanding before merge, pull, push, or tag decisions
next_recommended: v3.8.1: file history and commit details polish
v3.9.0: guided conflict resolution assistant and safer merge workflow automation
v3.10.0: interactive rebase and commit cleanup workflows
highlights: Restores clearer merge support that had become hidden or too current-branch dependent
Supports the real workflow: push feature upstream, merge selected feature into develop, run checks, merge develop into main
Keeps every merge/push action previewable and confirmation-based
iteration_highlights: Merge & Publish checklist preview for feature -> develop -> main
Merged feature branch cleanup command plans
Static release consistency checks for version drift
Updated README and repository workflow guidance
